---
title: "Main Experiment"
---

## Setup

- **Goal**: compare the full proposed method against all baselines on the held-out test set
- **Claim addressed**: Claim 1 — the full model outperforms [best baseline] by ≥ [δ] on [metric]
- **Run command**:

```bash
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method>
# MLflow run logged to: mlruns/
```

```{dot}
//| label: fig-main-setup
//| fig-cap: "Main experiment: training and evaluation flow"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.4
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.5, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  Train [label="Train Set", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Val   [label="Val Set",   fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Model [label="Best Ckpt"]
  Test  [label="Test Set",  fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
  Score [label="Final Score", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]

  Train -> Model
  Val   -> Model [label=" early stop", fontcolor="#adb5bd", fontsize=9]
  Model -> Test -> Score
}
```

---

## Results

> Fill in after running the experiment. Report mean ± std across [K] random seeds.

| Method | Metric A | Metric B | Metric C |
|--------|----------|----------|----------|
| Linear baseline | — | — | — |
| MLP-vanilla | — | — | — |
| [SotA method] | — | — | — |
| **Proposed (ours)** | **—** | **—** | **—** |

- Statistical test: [test name], p = [value] vs. best baseline
- Effect size: Cohen's d = [value] / Δ = [absolute improvement]

```{dot}
//| label: fig-main-results
//| fig-cap: "Result comparison: baseline vs. proposed"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.8
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.6, nodesep=0.45]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph col1 {
    rank=same
    BL1 [label="Linear",      fillcolor="#4a2040"]
    BL2 [label="MLP-vanilla", fillcolor="#4a2040"]
    BL3 [label="SotA",        fillcolor="#4a2040"]
  }
  subgraph col2 {
    rank=same
    Our [label="Proposed", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }
  subgraph col3 {
    rank=same
    Win [label="Claim 1\nConfirmed", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }

  BL1 -> Our [label=" Δ+?", fontcolor="#adb5bd", fontsize=9]
  BL2 -> Our [label=" Δ+?", fontcolor="#adb5bd", fontsize=9]
  BL3 -> Our [label=" Δ+?", fontcolor="#adb5bd", fontsize=9]
  Our -> Win
}
```

---

## Analysis

- **Error analysis**: which samples does the model get wrong? Any systematic pattern?
- **Confusion matrix**: large off-diagonal entries indicate [class-pair confusion] — [explanation]
- **Per-class performance**: [class with lowest recall] suffers from [hypothesised reason]
- **Calibration**: reliability diagram shows [over/under-confident in what range]

```{dot}
//| label: fig-analysis
//| fig-cap: "Error analysis pipeline"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.4
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.5, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  Preds  [label="Predictions",  fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Conf   [label="Confusion\nMatrix"]
  PerCls [label="Per-Class\nMetrics"]
  Calib  [label="Calibration",  fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]

  Preds -> Conf -> PerCls -> Calib
}
```

---

## MLflow Tracking

All runs automatically logged to `mlruns/`. To view:

```bash
mlflow ui --backend-store-uri mlruns/
# Open http://localhost:5000
```

Key logged artifacts: `config.yaml`, confusion matrix PNG, per-class metrics CSV, checkpoint path.
